title: Day 2 Daily Test — Self Introduction (40 Questions)

questions.hindi: मेरा नाम अनिल है।
options: My name is Anil.
I name Anil.
My name Anil is.
Anil is my name is.
questions.answer: My name is Anil.

questions.hindi: मैं जयपुर से हूँ।
options: I from Jaipur.
I am from Jaipur.
I am Jaipur from.
I from am Jaipur.
questions.answer: I am from Jaipur.

questions.hindi: मैं एक teacher हूँ।
options: I teacher.
I am teacher.
I am a teacher.
I a teacher am.
questions.answer: I am a teacher.
questions.explanation: Article 'a' teacher से पहले ज़रूरी है।

options: I am belongs to Delhi.
I belong to Delhi.
I belongs to Delhi.
I am belong to Delhi.
questions.answer: I belong to Delhi.
questions.explanation: 'belong' के साथ 'am' नहीं लगता, ना ही 's'।

questions.hindi: मेरे परिवार में चार लोग हैं।
options: There are four people in my family.
My family have four people.
Four people are in my family have.
There four people my family.
questions.answer: There are four people in my family.
questions.explanation: 'There are' + number + people in my family।

questions.hindi: मुझे किताबें पढ़ना पसंद है।
options: I like read books.
I like reading books.
I like to reading books.
I liking read books.
questions.answer: I like reading books.
questions.explanation: like के बाद verb+ing ('reading') आता है।

questions.hindi: आपसे मिलकर _____ हुई।
options: good
nice
happy
glad
questions.answer: nice
questions.explanation: 'Nice to meet you' standard greeting है।

questions.hindi: मैं दो साल से यहाँ काम कर रहा हूँ।
options: I work here for two years.
I have been working here for two years.
I am working here since two years.
I had worked here for two years.
questions.answer: I have been working here for two years.
questions.explanation: Present Perfect Continuous: have been + verb+ing + for।

questions.correct: I have two years of experience.
options: I have two year experience.
I have two years of experience.
I have two years experience is.
I having two year experience.
questions.answer: I have two years of experience.

questions.hindi: मेरा एक बड़ा भाई है।

I am elder brother have.
questions.answer: I have one elder brother.

questions.answer: I am a final year student.

questions.hindi: मुझे photography का शौक है।
options: I am passionate about photography.

I am passionate of photography.

questions.hindi: क्या मैं आपका नाम जान सकता हूँ?
options: May I know your name?

options: Hindi's
Hindi

options: My name is calling Rohan.

My name calls Rohan.
My name is call Rohan.
questions.answer: My name is Rohan.
questions.explanation: Direct simple structure सही है, 'calling' यहाँ गलत है।

questions.hindi: मैं हिंदी और अंग्रेजी दोनों में धाराप्रवाह हूँ।

questions.answer: I am fluent in both Hindi and English.

questions.hindi: मेरे पिता मेरा role model हैं।
options: My father is my role model.
